name: workplace_safety_workplace_injury_spike_kestrel_ind_col
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Workplace Safety, the situation tagged internally around workplace safety workplace injury spike kestrel ind col has converged with local pressure in the Lumen City corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Frontline managers report that frontline staff are already deviating from policy; silence from the top will be read as tacit approval. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. No option cleanly satisfies both individual and collective; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Jonah Kaur
agents.identity: I am Jonah Kaur, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Workplace Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Omar Mensah
agents.identity: I am Omar Mensah, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Workplace Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if individual advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for collective.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Jonah Kaur must choose under individual versus collective. What does Jonah Kaur do?
